name: context-budgeter
trigger: Before each model call or large prompt assembly.
warns_on: peripheral context is crowding out the active contract
remediation: Compress peripheral material, keep contract and blockers, and ask for guidance if tradeoffs remain.
limitations: Actual token accounting may not be available on every platform.
The runner only warns on large prompts; it does not hard-block budget overages.
fallback_behavior: Use deterministic prompt pruning rules from `instructions.md`.
